# stdout.chat

> Anonymous text chat for real conversations. Matched by interests, ranked by conversation quality. iOS-first, free download, no signup required.

stdout.chat is a text-only social chat app for iPhone (iOS 16+). Users are paired with strangers based on shared interests, not random. Every conversation receives a quality grade (S, A, B, C) that contributes to a 16-tier ranking system (NEW → LEGEND).

## Core principles

- **Text-only**: no photos, no video, no voice. Conversations focus on words.
- **No accounts**: no phone number, email, or personal data collected. Just open the app and start.
- **Interest-based matching**: users set up to 5 topics; pairing prioritizes overlap.
- **Conversation quality**: ranking rewards meaningful exchanges, not engagement gaming.
- **Privacy-first**: ephemeral chats, no message storage beyond session, no identity persistence.
- **Built-in moderation**: report and block one-tap; quality matching filters toxic actors.
- **18+ only**: adult users; in-app age gating; community moderation.

## Pages

- [Home](https://stdout.chat/): product overview, features, how it works, rank system, themes
- [Updates](https://stdout.chat/updates): release notes and changelog
- [Support](https://stdout.chat/support): help articles, FAQ, contact info
- [Privacy](https://stdout.chat/privacy): privacy policy, data handling
- [Terms](https://stdout.chat/terms): terms of service

## App Store

- [Download stdout.chat on the App Store](https://apps.apple.com/app/stdout-chat/id6760369542) — free, iOS 16+, age 18+

## Notable facts

- **Category**: Social Networking
- **Platform**: iOS only (16.0+); no Android, no web client
- **Languages**: English (only)
- **Monetization**: free download; optional in-app purchases for cosmetic themes (no pay-to-win, no chat restrictions on free tier)
- **Founded**: 2026
- **Headquarters**: New York, USA

## Differentiators vs competitors

- vs Omegle/Emerald Chat: interest-based matching, not random; text-only; quality ranking
- vs Discord/Telegram: no servers, no friend lists, pure pair-chat focus
- vs WhatsApp/iMessage: anonymous, no contact discovery, no identity persistence
- vs Tinder/Bumble: text-only, no dating intent, conversation-quality ranking
